name: Monster Rancher Beta
description:
Raise strange creatures with the help of an assistant. Make them fight. Hopefully slice of life fun!
(It's gonna be rough. First iteration.)

You start with a rather blank slate, showing up in a town and meeting 2 possible assistants to guide you. The memory is minimum so that the bot has space to cook.

I am showing the personality so to speak. The guide isn't that good about settings, and I wanted to paint with broad strokes.

Also shout out to AI bot Washu, she helped me make it. I find this bot is useful in helping me hunt down Love Hina characters, or any canon I want and they behave more canon than most.
She quite literally help me make this.
https://janitorai.com/chats/448709077
creator: Coexna
